shinyngs 2.4.0

Accent colour for loading spinners

Source: R/ui-helpers.R
shinyngsSpinnerColor.Rd

shinycssloaders::withSpinner() bakes its colour into a literal CSS value rather than accepting a var(--bs-primary) reference, so it can't pick up the Bootstrap theme variable directly. This returns the brand accent (SHINYNGS_ACCENT), the same value the theme's primary colour derives from.

Usage

shinyngsSpinnerColor()

Value

A hex colour string

On this page
